MaxLineLength:AssistantViewModel.kt$AssistantViewModel$content = "Hey! I'm your BELTECH assistant. Ask me about your spending, tasks, or schedule. 💡"

MaxLineLength:LocalAIEngine.kt$LocalAIEngine$"Hey! I'm your BELTECH assistant. I can help you with your expenses, tasks, and schedule. Try asking me something like \"How much did I spend today?\" or \"What tasks are pending?\""
MaxLineLength:LocalAIEngine.kt$LocalAIEngine$"I'm not sure how to answer that yet. Try asking about your spending, tasks, or upcoming events. Type \"help\" to see what I can do."
MaxLineLength:MerchantCategoryDao.kt$MerchantCategoryDao$"UPDATE merchant_categories SET category = :category, userCorrected = 1, confidence = 1.0 WHERE merchant = :merchant AND user_id = :userId"
MaxLineLength:MpesaSmsParserTest.kt$MpesaSmsParserTest$"QH12345678 Confirmed. Ksh1,250.00 sent to JOHN DOE 0712345678 on 7/3/26 at 10:15 AM. New M-PESA balance is Ksh300.00."
MaxLineLength:SettingsViewModel.kt$SettingsViewModel$infoMessage = if (enabled) "Notifications enabled" else "Notifications disabled and reminders cleared"
MaxLineLength:TaskDao.kt$TaskDao$"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE user_id = :userId AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND completed_at BETWEEN :start AND :end"
